task_description: Add essential admin/management menus to the website: password change, forgot password, admin dashboard, admin navigation, session timeout handling, and profile/account settings page. These features enable easy ongoing site maintenance without CLI commands.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds (exit code 0). No test framework configured in this project. All 3 features implemented and build-verified successfully. Review issues addressed: AdminLayout consistency, ProtectedRoute for OG settings, session timeout race fix, decodeToken deduplication.
